title: AdvanceKeyStrokes
description:
AdvanceKeystrokes is a Minecraft client-side overlay mod that displays your keyboard and mouse inputs in real time on screen.

It is mainly used for:

PvP gameplay

movement visualization

content creation

practice & training

🎮 Main Features

✔ Live W A
body:
AdvanceKeystrokes is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds a clean and modern keystrokes overlay to Minecraft, allowing players to see their live keyboard and mouse inputs directly on screen. The mod is designed for PvP players, practice sessions, and content creators who want a professional-looking way to visualize movement and clicks during gameplay.

The overlay shows real-time inputs such as movement keys ⌨️ W • A • S • D, mouse buttons 🖱️ LMB / RMB, and optional click information, helping players analyze movement consistency, improve gameplay mechanics, and showcase clean gameplay in videos or streams. The display updates instantly as keys are pressed, making it perfect for competitive play and training.

AdvanceKeystrokes focuses on simplicity, performance, and customization. Players can personalize the overlay to match their HUD style by adjusting colo<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AAKgBp3ncoA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>rs, backgrounds, scaling, and positioning. Visual options include rounded backgrounds, key shadows, rainbow effects, and rendering settings that control when the overlay appears (GUI screens, debug HUD, player list, etc.). This allows the overlay to look natural and unobtrusive while still being informative.

⚙️ Main Features

⌨️ Live WASD movement display

🖱️ Mouse clicks (LMB / RMB)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YqJa_l9qlAc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

📏 Adjustable size & scaling

🧩 Lightweight and performance-friendly

🎥 Great for PvP, practice, and content creation
